---
name: create-test-case
description: Recieves a github link to the issue, analyzes the issue, documentation, UI exploration, and existing OneTest coverage to create formal test cases in OneTest. Use this prompt after generating a functional testing checklist and when you are ready to translate checklist items into structured test cases in the OneTest system.
agent: QA Orchestrator
---
analyze the GitHub issue, documentation, UI exploration, and existing OneTest coverage to create formal test cases in OneTest. Use this prompt after generating a functional testing checklist and when you are ready to translate checklist items into structured test cases in the OneTest system.
